name: Tadalafil Cognition In Healthy Adults Baseline Review
summary: Stages the first baseline for tadalafil and cognition in healthy adults: a targeted search protocol, three sources, three study artifacts, three findings, and one bounded insufficient-evidence claim.

scope.research_question: What is the current evidence landscape for tadalafil and cognitive performance in healthy adults, especially mostly healthy men age 30 to 50?

proposed_changes.summary: Stage targeted search and screening protocol for healthy-adult cognition baseline.
proposed_changes.rationale: The baseline claim depends on source discovery and screening boundaries, especially the absence of direct tadalafil healthy-adult evidence in this targeted pass.

proposed_changes.summary: Add PASTIS tadalafil neuropsychological outcome source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This is the most directly relevant tadalafil-specific human cognitive outcome source identified in the targeted search.

proposed_changes.summary: Add structured PASTIS cognitive trial artifact.
proposed_changes.rationale: The baseline needs population, exposure, endpoint, directness, and safety context extracted before any claim can use this source.

proposed_changes.summary: Add finding that single-dose tadalafil did not significantly improve PASTIS cognitive outcomes.
proposed_changes.rationale: This atomic finding supports a bounded insufficient-evidence baseline and population-directness caveat.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ETLAS-2 tadalafil CSVD randomized trial source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source gives repeated tadalafil exposure and reports cognition plus tolerability boundaries, although the population is indirect.

proposed_changes.summary: Add structured ETLAS-2 main trial artifact.
proposed_changes.rationale: The baseline needs explicit extraction of dose, duration, population, comparator, cognitive endpoints, and adverse-event context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ETLAS-2 cognition and adverse-event finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding qualifies cognition claims with a repeated-dose null cognitive signal and safety/tolerability boundary.

proposed_changes.summary: Add adjacent vardenafil healthy-adult cognition source.
proposed_changes.rationale: No direct tadalafil healthy-adult cognition source was identified in the targeted pass, so this adjacent source helps bound PDE5 class extrapolation.

proposed_changes.summary: Add structured adjacent vardenafil cognition artifact.
proposed_changes.rationale: The source must be clearly marked as non-tadalafil before it can be used as adjacent evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add adjacent healthy-adult PDE5 cognition finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding prevents overgeneralizing PDE5 mechanisms into a tadalafil cognitive-enhancement claim.

proposed_changes.summary: Add bounded baseline claim for tadalafil and cognition in healthy adults.
proposed_changes.rationale: The first public baseline should emphasize insufficient direct evidence and directness limits, not efficacy.

proposed_claim_implications.note: Creates the first submitted baseline claim for tadalafil cognition in healthy adults.

extraction_follow_up_actions.reason: finding reneerkens-vardenafil-healthy-adults-null-finding-2013 reports metric text but numeric_results_extracted is false.
extraction_follow_up_actions.recommended_action: Extract table-level numeric results for Adjacent vardenafil study found no prominent cognitive effect in healthy adults before quantitative synthesis.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
endpoint_validity: Continue excluding imaging trends from cognition benefit wording unless a separate endpoint-specific support map is created.
exposure_directness: Keep low-dose daily healthy-adult cognition in unknown_or_unreviewed_contexts unless direct evidence is added.
population_directness: Preserve the low-confidence, insufficient-direct-evidence framing unless a direct healthy-adult tadalafil study is added.
safety_risk_framing: Complete the safety/interactions baseline before publishing broad benefit-oriented tadalafil summaries.
source_fidelity: No further action required for this issue; the staged source now uses NCT00123456.
source_fidelity: Keep the vardenafil evidence low confidence unless full text is retrieved in a later revision.
synthesis_overreach: Keep the claim summary and any public excerpt tied to insufficient direct evidence, not benefit or no-effect certainty.
Resolve 1 structured extraction follow-up action(s) before quantitative synthesis.
